scripts.demo: npm run build --workspace=@sushill/shadcn-scheduler && npm run dev --workspace=demo
scripts.demo:build: npm run build --workspace=@sushill/shadcn-scheduler && npm run build --workspace=demo
scripts.publish:npm: npm run build --workspace=@sushill/shadcn-scheduler && npm publish --workspace=@sushill/shadcn-scheduler --access public --registry https://registry.npmjs.org
scripts.publish:github: npm run build --workspace=@sushill/shadcn-scheduler && npm publish --workspace=@sushill/shadcn-scheduler --registry https://npm.pkg.github.com
scripts.publish:all: npm run publish:npm && npm run publish:github
